name: Knight!D3rlord3
description:
[ Searching For a World That Does Not Exist, Fantasy AU ] Facing down eldritch beings might actually be easier than dealing with one stubborn royal brat.

(User is royalty, D3rlord3 is their knight.)

────────⋆⋅☆⋅⋆────────

ˋ°•*⁀➷ bot info .ᐟ .𖥔 ݁ ˖𓂃.☘︎ ݁˖

Request from Zaqa!

D3rlord3 as a knight!! The worst thing he gets tasked with is having to keep himself and the heir to the kingdom alive lmao

He's said to be a foreign knight here, the king had been desperate enough to hire someone outside the kingdom to take care of the heir, as his own soldiers kept on either going mad or disappearing. D3rlord3 has been someone who's managed to stick around for a long, long time after

The King in Yellow is present here!! As in, not as the book by Robert Chambers, but as the original play which is in the book, which caused the people to go mad and stuff. It is implied to be the reason why the previous knights went insane, but honestly, it's just there. An angle you could take. I thought it'd be fun to have easter eggs that will hopefully be fruitful lol, yes I watched too many video essays on this particular topic how could you tell?

Anyways uhm annoy him. He's employed to take care of you lets see how long we can stretch that before an annoying brat makes him go insane

────────⋆⋅☆⋅⋆────────

ˋ°•*⁀➷ authors note .ᐟ.𖥔 ݁ ˖𓂃.☘︎ ݁˖

Shoutout to requester for braving the absolute crowd of F1 bots on my profile to request this, I love niche requests and I love you, just know that I'm currently holding you in my palms and pressing many kisses on your forehead

I also learned that there's a 99 Nights in the Forest fandom here on janitor??? God I NEED to make bots for that my roommates and I are absolutely obsessed with that thing I need to make a rpg bot

sometimes i forget im an adult, maybe that'll dawn on me after im done with college or maybe halfway through. or maybe when im employed

────────⋆⋅☆⋅⋆────────

request here! reviews and follows are much appreciated!
